overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path at night. The scene transitions from a dense forest corridor to open meadows, with distinctive teal-tinted moonlight illuminating the landscape.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the narrow forest path with two swords visible on his back

entered.detail: tall dark trees forming a dense wall on the left side of the path
tall dark trees forming a dense wall on the right side of the path
winding dirt trail with visible wheel ruts and patches of grass
bright crescent moon visible through gaps in the cloud cover

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail at night, with dense trees enclosing the path on both sides. Geralt walks steadily forward along the dirt path, illuminated by moonlight filtering through the canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest edge transitioning to open hillside

events.description: exiting dense forest as trees on left side recede into open grassy hillside

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the landscape opens up to the left, revealing more sky

entered.detail: open grassy terrain replacing the dense forest on the left side

segments.scene_description: As Geralt progresses, the dense forest on the left gives way to an open grassy hillside, while trees continue to line the right side. The path remains a dirt trail, now with more visible sky above.

events.description: entering fully open meadow with grassy fields on both sides and wildflowers visible

agents.ego_description: walking through the open meadow with unobstructed views of the night sky and distant terrain

entered.detail: expansive grassy fields replacing the hillside terrain
open meadow extending to the horizon on the right
patches of white wildflowers visible in the grass along the path

segments.scene_description: The environment opens completely into a wide meadow with grass and wildflowers on both sides of the path. The forest has receded, leaving an expansive view of the night sky with the crescent moon visible above.

events.description: stone walls and wooden fences appear along the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking past stacked stone walls and wooden fences while continuing through the meadow

entered.detail: low stacked stone wall running parallel to the path on the left
wooden fence posts and rails behind the stone wall

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, man-made structures appear as low stone walls and wooden fencing line the left side of the path. The meadow continues on the right while Geralt walks steadily forward through this semi-cultivated landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt path that transforms from a claustrophobic forest corridor into an expansive, semi-cultivated moonlit landscape. It begins deep within a dark forest where dense trees enclose the trail, with moonlight filtering through the thick canopy as Geralt walks forward. As he progresses, the forest on the left gives way to an open grassy hillside, gradually expanding the view of the night sky. The scene then opens completely into a wide meadow filled with wildflowers, leaving the trees behind to reveal a clear view of the crescent moon above. Finally, the landscape shifts toward a more settled area as low stone walls and wooden fencing appear along the left side of the path.
